name: Assault Treadmill Intervals
description: High-intensity sprint intervals on an assault/curved treadmill. Self-powered = no buttons, just go. ~15 minutes of pure work capacity and mental toughness.

activity.name: Easy Jog
activity.notes: Find your rhythm, gradually increase pace

exercises.name: All-Out Sprint
exercises.notes: Max effort — drive with arms and legs

activity.name: Easy Walk
activity.notes: Walk it off, let heart rate come down

tips: The curved treadmill is self-powered — the harder you push, the faster it goes
30s on / 30s off is a starting point — go 20s/40s if you're dying, or 40s/20s if you're a monster
8 rounds = 8 minutes of actual sprinting, which is plenty
Great paired with a KB session or as a standalone conditioning day
